articles.title: Now’s the time to book that Cape Cod getaway
articles.description:
Find out what’s ahead for the Hampton Beach Casino Ballroom, why Cape Cod travelers should book soon, and what else is worth a trip this week.

The post Now’s the time to book that Cape Cod getaway appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Cape Cod travelers should book accommodations soon to secure summer spots.
Hampton Beach Casino Ballroom events are scheduled for June 2023, attracting visitors.
Increased tourism may benefit local businesses in Boston and surrounding areas.

articles.title: Charlie McAvoy’s reward as Bruins’ OT hero? Another trip to the dentist’s chair.
articles.description:
“I wish the hits would stop coming, honestly. It is tiring. My mouth, honestly, couldn’t feel worse."

The post Charlie McAvoy’s reward as Bruins’ OT hero? Another trip to the dentist’s chair. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Charlie McAvoy scored in overtime, leading the Bruins to victory against the Kings.
McAvoy expressed frustration over repeated hits, resulting in dental issues.
Boston residents witness McAvoy's resilience despite physical toll on players.

articles.title: After her son was struck by a car, she’s running the Boston Marathon for Newton firefighters
articles.description:
"Turning that corner at mile 17.3 (The Firehouse) will be filled with so many emotions: gratitude, relief, inspiration and determination."

The post After her son was struck by a car, she’s running the Boston Marathon for Newton firefighters appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Maureen Murphy is running the Boston Marathon to support Newton firefighters.
Her son was struck by a car, prompting her fundraising efforts.
The marathon will raise awareness for the Newton Firefighters' Children Fund.
